title: CreditUsageReport
description: CreditUsageReport schema from Censys Platform API

credits_consumed_by_consumer.description: The breakdown of credits consumed by consumer. This may not be present if the report is generated for a specific user.

credits_consumed_by_source.description: The breakdown of credits consumed by source.

end_time.description: The end time of the window for this report.

periods.description: The periods of the report (i.e. time buckets).

start_time.description: The start time of the window for this report.

total_added.description: The total amount of credits added during the report period.

total_consumed.description: The total amount of credits consumed during the report period.

total_expired.description: The total amount of credits expired during the report period.

transaction_count.description: The total number of transactions during the report period.
